buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec prisma generate && pnpm -F @cureocity/contracts build && pnpm -F @cureocity/clinical build && pnpm -F @cureocity/llm build && pnpm -F @cureocity/storage build && pnpm -F @cureocity/notifications build && pnpm -F @cureocity/crypto build && pnpm -F @cureocity/observability build && pnpm -F @cureocity/api build
